title: Permissions
intro: The role defaults (Admin / Site manager / Standard) apply as normal. These toggles adjust what standard users (mechanics) may do across the whole business.

editPricing.label: Mechanics can edit estimates & pricing
editPricing.desc: When on, standard users can edit the estimate/quote on job cards at their location. Off: only managers and admins.

diaryEntries.label: Mechanics can add diary notes & create entries
diaryEntries.desc: When on, standard users can add/edit diary notes and create new entries from the diary at their location. Off: only managers and admins.
